vibe: Cute, modern, playful, colorful, soft and bouncy.

surfaces_and_shadows.input: bg-[#FFFAF6] border-2 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#FFB3A7] focus:ring-0 transition-all
surfaces_and_shadows.button_primary: bg-[#FFB3A7] text-[#2B2D42] rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(255,179,167,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(255,179,167,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 font-bold px-8 py-3
surfaces_and_shadows.button_secondary: bg-[#C8B6FF] text-[#2B2D42] rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(200,182,255,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(200,182,255,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 font-bold px-8 py-3

motion.page_load: staggered fade-up with spring physics (stiffness: 100, damping: 15)
motion.hover_state: soft lift (-translate-y-1 or -translate-y-2) with increased shadow intensity
motion.click_state: active:scale-95 for buttons and interactive cards

header.style: sticky top-4 z-50 mx-4 md:mx-12 px-6 py-3 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-full shadow-sm border border-[#F1E9E7] flex justify-between items-center

product_card.style: bg-white p-4 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-4
product_card.badge: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-[#B9FBC0] text-[#2B2D42] text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full

dashboard_widget.style: bg-white p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-[#F1E9E7] flex flex-col h-full

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'lucide-react' for icons. Use rounded, friendly icons.
Install Google Fonts 'Nunito' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body. Configure them in Tailwind.
For the UI, strictly avoid sharp corners (`rounded-sm`, `rounded-md`). Everything should be pill-shaped or have a very large border-radius (`rounded-[2rem]`, `rounded-full`).
Do not use dark mode. Stick to the light, pastel color palette provided. Ensure the background color is off-white (#FFFAF6), not pure white.
For shadows, do not use default gray shadows. Use colored shadows (e.g., rgba(255,179,167,0.15)) to maintain the soft aesthetic.
Implement Framer Motion for bouncy entrance animations (scale and fade-in).
For all interactive elements, ensure high contrast text (#2B2D42) over the pastel backgrounds.
Dashboard should look like a consumer app, not an enterprise tool. Keep spacing generous and use the rounded-card style.
The shopping cart should slide in from the right using a drawer panel with a rounded left edge.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements as per the critical rules.
